title: Igluu Meal Prep Glass Containers with Air Vent Lids (5 Pack+Extra Lid) – Airtight & BPA-Free – Oven, Microwave, Freezer and Dishwasher Safe – 840ml – Durable Borosilicate Glass
features: HIGH QUALITY DURABLE MATERIALS: The food containers are made from borosilicate glass, and it is the strongest glass available. The freezer storage boxes are stain-proof and non-toxic. The polypropylene plastic lids are BPA-free and leakproof.

⁠VERSATILE: These glass meal prep containers are safe to use in the freezer, dishwasher, microwave, air fryer and in the oven. Do not use lids in oven and air fryer. They are capable of withstanding temperatures between -20°C and +300°C.

⁠CONVENIENT: The containers with lids for storage have capacity of 840ml 28oz and dimensions of 19cm x 13cm x 7cm, which makes them ideal for meal preparation. 5 food storage containers come with 6 lids - an extra lid in case you lose one.
⁠AIRTIGHT: The LockTab system in these glass containers with lids allows the food to remain fresh for longer. The lids come with air vents and removable silicone seals that are easy to clean.
FOOD SAFETY TESTED: These food containers with lids are LFGB and SGS certified.
description: Product Description Smart Features That Make Meal Prep Efficient Airtight Snap-Lock Lid Locks in freshness and prevents leaks — perfect for on-the-go meals. Removable Silicone Seal Easy to clean and replace — designed for long-term hygiene and reuse. Built-In Steam Vent Allows safe microwave heating without pressure build-up (with lid loosened). Bonus Spare Lid Because we know lids can go missing — we’ve got you covered. Previous page Next page 1 Dimensions & Use Cases 2 Smart Design Features 3 Certifications Are the Igluu Meal Prep Containers safe for use in the microwave? Yes, the Igluu Meal Prep Containers are microwave-safe. They are made from premium BPA-free plastic that can withstand high temperatures, making them ideal for reheating meals without compromising the material's integrity or safety. How can I access the Igluu Meal Prep Guide with 24 recipes? When you receive your meal prep containers, scan the code on the packaging to download the PDF ebook. How does the airtight seal work to keep food fresh? The airtight lids on these containers create a secure seal that helps keep food fresh for longer by preventing air from entering. This makes them ideal for meal prepping and storing food in the fridge or freezer without worrying about it drying out. Are these containers dishwasher-safe, and do they retain any stains or odours? Yes, Igluu Meal Prep Containers are dishwasher-safe, making cleanup easy and convenient. They are also stain and odour-resistant, so you can use them for a variety of foods without worrying about lingering smells or discolouration. Are Igluu meal prep containers made from BPA-free materials? Our containers are distinguished by their premium construction, using thicker and more durable BPA-free plastic. They also feature raised lids for increased storage capacity, airtight seals to maintain freshness, and a stackable design to save space.
